pages.label: Cover and charge
pages.text: RESTRICTED — PROSECUTION DISCLOSURE BUNDLE URN: 26/DA/020 Defendant: Sophie Reid Court: Family Court Hub Magistrates === SECTION: COVER_INDEX === INDEX Document | Pages | Note Charge sheet | 1 | MG5 case summary | 2-3 | MG6C disclosure schedule | 4 | MG11 complainant statement (draft unsigned) | 5-6 | Screenshot and message pack | 7-8 | Exhibit list | 9 | Police note — attribution | 10 | Court listing | 11 | === SECTION: CHARGE === R v Sophie Reid Statement of Offence: Harassment, contrary to section 2 of the Protection from Harassment Act 1997 Particulars of Offence: Between October 2025 and January 2026 sent harassing messages to Alex Turner.

pages.label: MG5 (1/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG5 === MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT URN: 26/DA/020 Anticipated Plea: Not Guilty Officer in case: DC Morris 4418 Headline Summary The prosecution relies on a served screenshot and message pack, a phone extraction summary, and complainant  account. Full phone download, subscriber data, and final signed MG11 are outstanding. Attribution is asserted  in police papers but not fully proved on current disclosure.

pages.label: MG5 (2/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG5 === Domestic context noted in complainant account — full digital attribution still required before sender identity is  safely confirmed. Evidence on file (served) Charge sheet; MG5; MG6C schedule; draft complainant MG11; screenshot/message pack (SR/01); exhibit list;  police attribution note. Evidence referred or outstanding Full phone download/source export; subscriber/account data; full message export; call logs; device-level  extraction metadata; final signed MG11; MG6C clarification on unused material.

pages.label: MG6C schedule
pages.text: === SECTION: MG6 === MG6C — UNUSED MATERIAL SCHEDULE MG6C/001 — Phone extraction summary — served (summary only; source download outstanding). MG6C/002 — Screenshot and message pack SR/01 — served on bundle. MG6C/003 — Subscriber/account data — outstanding — not on bundle. MG6C/004 — Full phone download / source export — outstanding — not on bundle. MG6C/005 — Call logs — outstanding — not on bundle. MG6C/006 — Device metadata export — referred on MG6C — not attached. MG6C/007 — Final signed complainant MG11 — outstanding — draft only on bundle. MG6C/008 — Additional unused material — clarification sought.

pages.label: MG11 complainant (draft)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG11 === MG11 — COMPLAINANT STATEMENT (draft unsigned) I am Alex Turner. Between January and March 2026 I received persistent messages on WhatsApp and SMS  from a number I did not recognise.

pages.label: MG11 complainant (cont.)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG11 === I saved screenshots exhibited as SR/01. Police told me a phone was seized from Sophie Reid. I have not seen  the full phone download and cannot say who typed each message without subscriber/account records. Statement not yet signed — final MG11 outstanding.

pages.label: Screenshot/message pack (1/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: SCREENSHOTS === EXHIBIT SR/01 — SCREENSHOT AND MESSAGE PACK (served) Pack reference: DFU/SR/2026 Note: Screenshots served. Full extraction source file not attached. --- Screenshot 1 (WhatsApp) --- From: +44 7700 900220 "I know where you work"

pages.label: Screenshot/message pack (2/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: SCREENSHOTS === --- Screenshot 2 (SMS) --- From: +44 7700 900220 "Answer me" --- Extraction summary (served summary only) --- DFU summary: partial extraction completed. Full download referred on MG6C/004 — not attached. Subscriber identity: not on bundle (MG6C/003 outstanding).

pages.label: Exhibit list
pages.text: === SECTION: EXHIBIT_LIST === EXHIBIT LIST — R v Sophie Reid (26/DA/020) SR/01 — Screenshot and message pack — SERVED — pages 7-8 SR/02 — Phone extraction summary — SERVED (summary only) SR/03 — Draft complainant MG11 — SERVED (unsigned) SR/04 — Subscriber/account data — NOT SERVED SR/05 — Full phone download — NOT SERVED

pages.label: Police note — attribution
pages.text: === SECTION: POLICE_NOTE === POLICE NOTE — DIGITAL ATTRIBUTION (DC Morris 4418) Screenshot pack SR/01 is served. Attribution of sender identity for +44 7700 900220 is asserted but NOT fully  proved: subscriber/account data and full phone download are outstanding.

pages.label: Listing
pages.text: === SECTION: LISTING === PTPH listed — 18 August 2026, 10:00, Family Court Hub Magistrates, Court 3.

=== SECTION: MG5 === MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT URN: 26/DA/020 Anticipated Plea: Not Guilty Officer in case: DC Morris 4418 Headline Summary The prosecution relies on a served screenshot and message pack, a phone extraction summary, and complainant  account. Full phone download, subscriber data, and final signed MG11 are outstanding. Attribution is asserted  in police papers but not fully proved on current disclosure.

=== SECTION: MG5 === Domestic context noted in complainant account — full digital attribution still required before sender identity is  safely confirmed. === SECTION: MG11 === MG11 — COMPLAINANT STATEMENT (draft unsigned) I am Alex Turner. Between January and March 2026 I received persistent messages on WhatsApp and SMS  from a number I did not recognise.

=== SECTION: EXHIBIT_LIST === EXHIBIT LIST — R v Sophie Reid (26/DA/020) SR/01 — Screenshot and message pack — SERVED — pages 7-8 SR/02 — Phone extraction summary — SERVED (summary only) SR/03 — Draft complainant MG11 — SERVED (unsigned) SR/04 — Subscriber/account data — NOT SERVED SR/05 — Full phone download — NOT SERVED
